items.title: Hotel Pays Tourist $1,200 After He Couldn’t Get a Pool Chair
items.dek: A German tourist won a $1,200 settlement after failing to secure poolside lounge chairs at a packed Greek resort, reigniting debate over “towel wars” in Europe.
items.body: A German tourist won a $1,200 settlement after failing to secure poolside lounge chairs at a packed Greek resort, reigniting debate over “towel wars” in Europe. submitted by /u/miauguau44 [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Colorful ‘sea piggies’ are mysteriously washing up on Texas beaches

items.title: Bosnia's powerful peace envoy quits, with questions over role's future
items.dek: Christian Schmidt had been in the role since 2021, and departs after appearing to lose the backing of the United States.
items.body: Christian Schmidt had been in the role since 2021, and departs after appearing to lose the backing of the United States.
